violations.description: POISONS/TOXIC MATERIALS AND MEDICINE (3 pts): Chemical spray bottles noted not labeled in kitchen.
CONTAMINATION DURING STORAGE (2 pts): Food noted being stored on the floor in walk-in freezer
CONTAMINATION FROM WIPING CLOTHS (2 pts): Wiping cloths noted laying on counter in food prep areas.
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Microwave interior not properly maintained.
DISHWASHING FACILITIES (2 pts): Sanitizer test kit noted not provided.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Equipment exteriors (cooler and freezer doors) noted need cleaning
VENTILATION HOOD SYSTEM (1 pts): Exhaust hood and filters noted need cleaning.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors walls ceiling and ceiling vents in the food prep area noted in need of cleaning.
